evals.prompt: 请把这份 PDF 打印出来，先检查会用到哪台打印机，再给我最终打印命令或执行结果：/Users/jiangbin/Documents/report.pdf
evals.expected_output: Resolves the target printer safely, uses preview/dry-run if details are missing, then prints or returns a concrete execution plan.

evals.prompt: 把 `contract.docx` 打 2 份，长边双面，走默认打印机；如果默认打印机不存在，就先列出可用打印机。
evals.expected_output: Converts contract.docx to PDF, prints with 2 copies and long-edge duplex, or fails safely with available printer choices.

evals.prompt: 把当前文件夹所有 PDF 批量打印，但先 dry-run，不要真的出纸。
evals.expected_output: Builds a batch print plan with no side effects, returning per-file results and aggregate success counters.

evals.prompt: 帮我打印这个文件：budget.xlsx。如果 LibreOffice 没装，要明确告诉我缺什么。
evals.expected_output: Fails with CONVERSION_FAILED and actionable setup guidance when Office-to-PDF conversion is unavailable.

evals.prompt: 在 Windows 上把 `slides.pdf` 打到 `Finance Color Printer`，如果 lpr 不可用就自动改走 pdf-to-printer。
evals.expected_output: Uses lpr when available or falls back to pdf-to-printer without changing the user intent.

evals.prompt: 打印 `confidential.pdf`，但我还没告诉你打印机，也没说单双面。先别直接打印。
evals.expected_output: Does not send a real print job immediately; instead resolves ambiguity through preview, dry-run, or printer listing.
